description: You have a Java project called 'commons-cli' (Apache Commons CLI library) located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/commons-cli/ open in Eclipse. This project is not currently under version control. Use Eclipse's EGit integration to initialize a local Git repository for this project. Create a .gitignore file in the project root that excludes target/, *.class, .settings/, .classpath, and .project. Stage all project files, including the .gitignore file, and make an initial local commit with the exact message: "Initial commit: Import Apache Commons CLI library". Ensure build artifacts are excluded from the commit and do not push to any remote.

metadata.expected_commit_message: Initial commit: Import Apache Commons CLI library
